description: A team's new home jersey is selling out quickly online. An agent needs to check inventory and order more.

nodes.task_description: Check the current inventory level for the new home jersey in the e-commerce system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that several sizes are close to selling out.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the sales velocity to forecast when the remaining stock will be depleted.

expected_outcome.value: The forecast shows all stock will be gone in 48 hours.

nodes.task_description: Place a rush reorder with the jersey manufacturer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully places a new purchase order for more jerseys.
